faq.question: What is a wood clad window?
faq.answer: Wood Clad windows are built around a wood-clad frame system, chosen for a real-wood interior with a weather-resistant protective exterior shell. In practice the choice covers frame construction, glazing package and finish, all of which Deluxe Windows documents in each product proposal.

faq.question: How long do wood clad windows last?
faq.answer: Wood Clad windows and doors typically serve 30-50 years when the cladding and seals are maintained. Quality of installation, sun exposure and upkeep move products to either end of that range, so seals and hardware should be checked periodically.

faq.question: Are wood-clad windows better than vinyl?
faq.answer: The honest comparison depends on priorities: Wood Clad stands out for window and door products suited to different home styles, while competitors trade differently on price, warranty and looks. Pricing is confirmed per series and opening during the estimate. Deluxe Windows shows both options side by side in the showroom.

faq.question: What are the main benefits of wood clad windows?
faq.answer: Wood Clad windows offer a real-wood interior with a weather-resistant protective exterior shell. Whether they fit depends on the home's architecture, opening sizes, performance goals and budget.
